title: Figure 2 from: Sánchez Roque Y, Pérez-Luna Y, Moreira Acosta J, Farrera Vázquez  N, Berrones Hernández  R, Saldaña Trinidad  S, Pathiyamattom J (2018) Evaluation of the population dynamics of microalgae isolated from the state of Chiapas, Mexico with respect to the nutritional quality of water. Biodiversity Data Journal 6: e28496. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.6.e28496
author: Sánchez Roque, Yazmin

description: Figure 2 Relative abundance of the morphotypes and classes of microalgae identified in the different hydrographic zones evaluated in the state of Chiapas. SR: Suchiate river; NAR: Nandayapa river; HR: Huixtla river; SWC: Spring water Cahuaré; NR: Novillero river; WC: Wastewaters "La chacona"; PR: Pijijiapan river; SDR: Santo Domingo river.
